title: dissotis decandra
intro: Dissotis decandra, also known as the 'white dissotis', is a plant species native to tropical Africa, particularly in the regions of Cameroon, Democratic Republic of the Congo, and Nigeria. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dissotis decandra include its ability to treat fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antidiarrheal agent. In terms of herbal preparations, Dissotis decandra is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically to treat various health conditions.
